Enabling backup quota on a backup job wi: Enabling backup quota on a backup job will allow account backup usage to be sent by daily cron or API call to your CRM system (WHMCS for example).  In order for the backup quota to work, you must enable both the account and the backup job.  For more information, please visit the Backup Job Setting documentation.
